heading_content_part: Transfer of personal information outside of Brazil permitted by the lawWe are allowed to transfer your personal information outside of the Brazilian territory in the following cases:when the transfer is necessary for international legal cooperation between public intelligence, investigation and prosecution bodies, according to the legal means provided by the international law;when the transfer is necessary to protect your life or physical security or those of a third party;
